label: Pocket map properties
description: Configuration for pocket maps generated by a MapGeneratorDef. Controls biome, temperature, tile mutators, and behavioral flags for the pocket map.

biome.label: Biome
biome.description: BiomeDef assigned to this pocket map.

tileMutators.label: Tile mutators
tileMutators.description: TileMutatorDefs applied to the pocket map tile.

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.description: Fixed temperature in Celsius for the pocket map, overriding biome temperature.

destroyOnParentMapAbandoned.label: Destroy on parent map abandoned
destroyOnParentMapAbandoned.description: If true, the pocket map is destroyed when its parent map is abandoned.

preventPrisonerEscape.label: Prevent prisoner escape
preventPrisonerEscape.description: If true, prisoners cannot escape from this pocket map.

canLaunchGravship.label: Can launch gravship
canLaunchGravship.description: If true, a gravship can be launched from this pocket map.

canBeCleaned.label: Can be cleaned
canBeCleaned.description: If true, colonists will clean filth on this pocket map.
